recommendations.title: Soften 9 toxic exit paths
recommendations.detail: max_loss; sl_breached,ichimoku_regime_break; ema_regime_reversed; below_trigger,trigger_breached_5pct,daily_ema_regime_break,overextended,left_entry_corridor,large_adverse_move; time_exit_loser_choppy; below_trigger,trigger_breached_5pct,left_entry_corridor,adverse_move_warning; time_exit_loser_transitional; sl_breached,tp_reached,daily_ema_regime_break,ichimoku_regime_break; below_trigger,trigger_breached_5pct,left_entry_corridor,large_adverse_move cause net damage of -290.89% pts. Key fix: delay ichimoku_regime_break via min hold; reduce max_loss threshold.

recommendations.title: Add 24h minimum hold before ichimoku/regime-break exits
recommendations.detail: 4h-1d: 149t, 26.2%WR, -140.65% total. 3-7d: 46t, 65.2%WR, +129.21% total. Many 4h-1d losers would become 3-7d winners if regime-break exits were delayed.

recommendations.title: Maximize RSI exit path — delay fixed TP when RSI is trending
recommendations.detail: RSI exits: SOFT_FUSE_RSI_CONFIRMED(119t,95%WR,+3.05%), HARD_FUSE_RSI_EXTREME(8t,87.5%WR,+6.51%). When RSI > 65, delay TP to let the RSI fuse fire for higher profit.

recommendations.title: Blacklist 10 toxic tickers
recommendations.detail: ELF, AVAV, BABA, AMD, PATH, VMI, LRN, VRTX, FSLR, RKLB — SQN < -1, consistent losers. Total damage: -65.47%.

recommendations.title: Cap SL multiplier at 1.2x ATR (normal_sl profile)
recommendations.detail: normal_sl: 363t, 56.7%WR, SQN 1.01. wide_sl: 168t, 47.6%WR, SQN 0.32. Normal is dramatically better.

recommendations.title: Block entries at 8:00, 12:00, 14:00 ET
recommendations.detail: These hours have negative expectancy across 98 trades. Total damage: -63.94%.

recommendations.title: Tighten consecutive loss cooldown (2 losses → pause 48h)
recommendations.detail: 12 consecutive losses reached. Max DD: 39.24%. Pausing after 2 rapid losses would limit damage.

recommendations.title: Restrict SHORT to rank >= 80 + confirmed HTF_BEAR
recommendations.detail: SHORT: 43.9%WR, -0.092% avg across 123 trades. Net drag on the system.

recommendations.title: Raise entry bar for MOMENTUM tickers (require rank >= 70)
recommendations.detail: MOMENTUM: 26t, 42.3%WR, SQN 0.1. The weakest behavior type.
